title: ophiocaryon heterophyllum
intro: Ophiocaryon heterophyllum, also known as Chotacan or Indian Spikenard, is a plant species that belongs to the family Berberidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ophiocaryon heterophyllum include relief from fever, rheumatism, and various types of infections, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Ophiocaryon heterophyllum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds.
